stimulus: Electric scooter sharing programs allow users to pick up a scooter at one location within a city and leave it at any other permitted location, which can produce serious mismatches between scooter supply and rider demand. Hye-Won Park applies machine learning to commuting data to identify when a high volume of one-way trips is likely to leave some neighborhoods ______blank scooters and other neighborhoods with insufficient inventory.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. "Overstocked with" means having a surplus of. The text describes an imbalance: when scooters accumulate in some neighborhoods at the expense of others. The blank, contrasted with "insufficient inventory," must name the surplus side.

Choice B is incorrect. "Dependent on" would suggest the neighborhoods rely on scooters for some need, but the text describes a question of supply, not reliance. Choice C is incorrect. "Insensitive to" doesn't fit; neighborhoods don't react sensitively or insensitively to scooters. Choice D is incorrect. "Devoid of" means empty of; the contrast with "insufficient supply" requires the blank to indicate the opposite—an excess—not another form of shortage.
